message:
test: add unit tests for evidence pack parsing/rendering

Add comprehensive unit tests for evidence pack functionality:
- ID formatting (EV-001, EV-042, EV-999)
- Access method inference from source URLs (doi, url, file, session, manual)
- Table value escaping for markdown
- Markdown rendering (deterministic output, anchor stability)
- Full integration test with realistic evidence pack

42 tests covering:
- formatEvidenceId() - 5 tests
- inferAccessMethod() - 9 tests
- escapeTableValue() - 4 tests
- renderEvidenceMd() - 24 tests (header, records, excerpts, determinism, anchor stability)

Closes brenner_bot-5so.13.2.3
